entities.name: LAND COVER AND LAND USE (LCLU)
entities.description: Information used for monitoring the status of land resources to ensure sustainable planning.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE LAND USE PLANNING AND DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The goal of ensuring land resources are managed and developed sustainably.

entities.name: LCLU CHANGE
entities.description: The extent of change in land cover and land use over time.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where land cover mapping and LCLU changes are being analyzed.

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: A driver that increases the demand for land resources.

entities.name: LAND COVER MAPPING
entities.description: The process of producing regional and national maps to monitor land cover.

entities.name: CLASSIFICATION SYSTEMS AND LEGENDS
entities.description: The frameworks used to categorize land cover, which currently lack standardization.

entities.name: LAND COVER META LANGUAGE (LCML)
entities.description: A standardized language based on ISO standards for land cover classification.

entities.name: ISO STANDARDS
entities.description: International standards that provide a basis for the Land Cover Meta Language.

entities.name: MULTISTAKEHOLDER COLLABORATION
entities.description: The process of involving multiple parties to develop a standardized classification system.

entities.name: STANDARDIZED LAND COVER CLASSIFICATION SYSTEM
entities.description: A unified system for land cover classification to enable data integration and efficient management.

entities.name: SURVEY DATA
entities.description: Data collected to evaluate historical, current, and future land cover mapping projects.

relationships.target: SUSTAINABLE LAND USE PLANNING AND DEVELOPMENT
